description_long: This object is a large, straight-bladed knife or short sword with a prominent, slightly curved blade and a wooden handle. The blade appears metallic, with a polished, reflective surface and a single edge, tapering to a sharp point. The handle is made of wood, featuring a contoured grip and a visible metal pommel at the end. A crossguard is present between the blade and handle, providing protection for the user's hand. The set includes a matching sheath, also with wooden and metal elements, designed to securely house the blade. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for both display and practical use in an urban or domestic context.
description: A large, straight-edged knife or short sword with a polished metal blade, wooden handle, crossguard, and matching sheath.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blade, handle, and sheath laid out on a flat surface.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the thickness of the blade and the rounded pommel of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's reflective surface and the sheath's metal tip.
description_view_3: View from the handle end, emphasizing the crossguard and the alignment of the blade with the sheath.
attribute_handle_design: contoured wooden grip with metal pommel and visible rivets
